name: The Now (In)famous $250.00 Neiman Marcus Cookie
recipeIngredient: 1 Hershey bar, grated and blended into 8 oz.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and both sugars until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla, mixing well with the flour mixture.
3. Combine the blended oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and baking soda in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
6. Roll the dough into bars and place them 2-inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 10 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Note: Blend the oatmeal in a blender to achieve a fine powder consistency. This recipe makes approximately 112 cookies.
